query:
SELECT
                message_id,
                tx_id::text::bigint AS "tx_id!: i64",
                producer_name,
                content_json,
                occurred_on,
                version as "version!"
            FROM outbox_messages
            WHERE
                producer_name = $1
                AND (tx_id::text::bigint, message_id) > ($2::bigint, $3)
            ORDER BY tx_id, message_id
            LIMIT $4
